title: Eva spots the glitter at the tide line
prompt: Mid-shot on @beach-shore at the gentle calm surf line. @Papa already CENTER-FRAME standing knee-deep in the calm gentle surf with both feet planted firmly on the sandy seabed, both hands gently gripping Eva's ankles. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Eva already perched up safely on Papa's shoulders with both legs softly bent and feet resting against Papa's chest, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Eva goes still all of a sudden, eyes locked wide on something glittering softly in the wet sand at the tide line, off-screen to her right. Eva slowly raises her right index finger and points carefully toward the spot, mouth small in awe. Papa follows her gaze and squints curiously, head tilted slightly. The waves go soft and quiet for a hush moment. Eva (cheerful wide-eyed urgent stage-whisper): "Daddy... LOOK — something is shiny!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Papa (warm soft curious tone): "...I see it too. Let's go check." Papa stays standing in the gentle surf with both feet planted on the sandy seabed, holding Eva safely steady. The water around Papa's legs stays calm and gentle. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing of facial features, no shifting of hair or wardrobe, no color drift on clothing or skin tone. Keep all character bodies stable, consistent in scale, and locked to the same outfit and hairstyle from second 0 through the final second. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Papa stays grounded with both feet on the sandy seabed throughout. Eva stays safely seated on Papa's shoulders throughout. Calm cheerful kid-show ocean ambiance throughout — gentle wave swoosh, no scary intensity, no shouting.
